extDesc.message: AI-powered auto-reply assistant for WhatsApp, Messenger and Facebook, with multi-model AI support, custom personas, and smart knowledge base integration.

aiReplyHint.message: Right-click for more options · Long-press to drag

draggable.description: Hint label shown when long-pressing the floating button

aiThinking.description: Toast shown while AI is generating

almostDone.description: Toast shown when generation is nearly complete

noChatFound.message: No chat history found. Please open a chat window that contains messages.
noChatFound.description: Toast error when no chat context found

noChatFoundShort.description: Short toast error when no chat context found

pluginConnError.description: Toast prefix for extension connection errors

refreshRetrySuffix.description: Suffix appended to connection error toast

replyGeneratedPreview.message: Reply generated! Please preview, edit, then insert.
replyGeneratedPreview.description: Toast on reply generated with preview

quotaRemainingToday.description: Toast showing remaining daily quota; $1 is the number

generatingTemplate.description: Toast when generating from a template; $1 is the template label

replyInserted.description: Toast when reply inserted into input

autoFillFailed.message: Unable to auto-fill, please copy manually
autoFillFailed.description: Toast when auto-fill into input fails

copiedToClipboard.description: Toast when text copied to clipboard

noContextRegen.message: No chat history available to regenerate
noContextRegen.description: Toast when no context for regeneration

replyRegeneratedPreview.message: Reply regenerated! Please preview, edit, then send.
replyRegeneratedPreview.description: Toast when reply regenerated with preview

quotaExhausted.message: Today's free quota is exhausted ($1 replies). Please upgrade to Pro.
quotaExhausted.description: Toast when free quota exhausted; $1 is the limit

replyGeneratedCheck.message: Reply generated, please review before sending

autoGenFailed.description: Toast prefix for auto generation failure

licenseRevoked.message: Your license has been revoked. Please reactivate to continue using.

unknownApiError.message: Unknown error, please check API settings.
unknownApiError.description: Error message for unknown API error

networkRequestFailed.message: Network request failed. Please check your network connection or API URL.

apiKeyInvalid.message: API key invalid or unauthorized (HTTP 401). Please check your API Key.

apiUrlNotFound.message: API URL not found (HTTP 404). Please check your API URL.

rateLimited.message: Too many requests or quota exhausted (HTTP 429). Please try again later or check your balance.

aiServerError.message: AI server error ($1). Please try again later.
aiServerError.description: Error message for 5xx; $1 is the status code

recent.description: Quick menu section label for recent templates

common.description: Quick menu section label for common templates

moreStyles.description: Quick menu section label for more templates

customPromptDesc.message: Describe the reply style or content you want

customPromptPlaceholder.message: e.g. Reply in a formal tone, express thanks and ask for more details...

ctrlEnterSubmit.description: Hint text in custom prompt dialog

fullscreenEdit.description: Fullscreen editor title and button tooltip

quotaExhaustedDesc.message: Your $1 daily free replies are used up. They reset automatically tomorrow.
quotaExhaustedDesc.description: Quota panel description; $1 is the limit

upgradeProUnlimited.message: ✨ Upgrade to Pro for unlimited use

thinking.description: Button status label while AI is thinking

typing.description: Button status label while inserting reply

tplConcisePrompt.message: Generate a concise, direct reply, no more than 2 sentences

tplQuestionPrompt.message: Generate a reply with a relevant question to continue the conversation

tplAgreementPrompt.message: Generate a reply expressing agreement or support

tplDisagreementPrompt.message: Generate a reply politely expressing disagreement

tplFollowupPrompt.message: Generate a follow-up or reminder reply

freeRemaining.description: Popup license status; $1 is the number

proDaysLeft.description: Popup license status; $1 is the number

licenseInvalidMsg.message: Your license has been activated on another device. This device has been logged out automatically.

permRequiredMsg.message: Please go to the extension settings page, click "Test Connection" to authorize $1 and retry.

permRequiredError.message: API domain $1 is not authorized. Please go to the settings page and click "Test Connection" to complete authorization.

fingerprintMismatch.message: Device fingerprint mismatch, you have been forced offline

freeLimitExhausted.message: Free tier daily limit of $1 replies is exhausted. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited replies.

apiKeyNotConfigured.message: Please configure the API Key first

requestTimeout.message: Request timeout ($1s). Please check your network connection.
